original: We need to leverage our core competencies to drive synergies across the organization.
transformed: We need to use what we are good at to work better across teams.
label: accept

original: The KPI dashboard surfaces actionable insights for stakeholders.
transformed: The dashboard shows useful information for everyone involved.
label: accept

original: Please action this item at your earliest convenience.
transformed: Please handle this when you can.
label: accept

original: We're going to circle back on this offline.
transformed: Let's talk about this later in a separate meeting.
label: accept

original: Let's take this conversation offline to align on next steps.
transformed: Let's continue this discussion later to agree on what to do next.
label: accept

original: We need to operationalize this strategy across business units.
transformed: We need to put this strategy into practice across the company.
label: accept

original: I want to socialize this idea with the team before we commit.
transformed: I want to share this idea with the team before we decide.
label: accept

original: The product roadmap requires recalibration based on customer feedback.
transformed: We need to update the product plan based on customer feedback.
label: accept

original: We have bandwidth constraints this sprint.
transformed: We do not have enough time this sprint.
label: accept

original: Let's table this discussion until next quarter.
transformed: Let's pause this discussion until next quarter.
label: accept

original: I wanted to reach out regarding the upcoming review cycle.
transformed: Hi - quick note about the upcoming review cycle.
label: accept

original: I would appreciate your input on the attached document at your earliest convenience.
transformed: Could you take a look at the attached doc when you get a chance?
label: accept

original: Please find attached the requested quarterly report for your review.
transformed: Here's the quarterly report you asked for.
label: accept

original: I am writing to inquire about the status of my application.
transformed: Just checking in on my application.
label: accept

original: Thank you for taking the time to consider my request.
transformed: Thanks for thinking it over.
label: accept

original: I look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience.
transformed: Let me know when you can.
label: accept

original: It is my understanding that the deadline has been extended.
transformed: I think the deadline got pushed back.
label: accept

original: Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact me.
transformed: Ping me if you have questions.
label: accept

original: I would like to schedule a meeting to discuss the proposal.
transformed: Want to grab time to talk through the proposal?
label: accept

original: Per our previous correspondence, the matter has been resolved.
transformed: Like I said before, this is sorted out.
label: accept

original: The new policy goes into effect on Monday.
transformed: The new policy starts Monday.
label: accept

original: Submissions are due by the end of the day Friday.
transformed: Please send your submissions by Friday end of day.
label: accept

original: The team completed the migration ahead of schedule.
transformed: The team finished the migration earlier than planned.
label: accept

original: Customers can now access the dashboard from mobile devices.
transformed: Mobile users can now reach the dashboard.
label: accept

original: The feature is available to all enterprise tier accounts.
transformed: All enterprise customers get the feature.
label: accept

original: Engineering will roll out the change next week.
transformed: Next week, engineering ships the change.
label: accept

original: Documentation has been updated to reflect the new workflow.
transformed: We updated the docs to match the new workflow.
label: accept

original: The patch resolves the latency regression observed last month.
transformed: The fix addresses last month's slowdown.
label: accept

original: Account holders should expect downtime during the maintenance window.
transformed: Expect downtime during maintenance if you have an account.
label: accept

original: Recovery procedures are documented in the operations runbook.
transformed: See the operations runbook for recovery steps.
label: accept

original: Onboarding completes within seven business days.
transformed: Onboarding takes about a week.
label: accept

original: Quarterly results exceeded analyst expectations.
transformed: We beat the quarterly forecasts.
label: accept

original: Inventory levels remain stable across all warehouses.
transformed: Stock is steady across our warehouses.
label: accept

original: Compliance training must be completed before the end of the month.
transformed: Finish your compliance training before month end.
label: accept

original: The integration supports both REST and GraphQL endpoints.
transformed: It works with REST and GraphQL.
label: accept

original: Audit logs retain entries for ninety days by default.
transformed: By default, audit logs keep entries for ninety days.
label: accept

original: The configuration loader validates settings at service startup.
transformed: Settings get validated by the configuration loader when the service starts.
label: accept

original: Customer support escalations route to the on-call engineer.
transformed: Support escalations go to whoever is on call.
label: accept

original: The cache invalidates entries older than five minutes.
transformed: Cache entries older than five minutes are invalidated.
label: accept
